summary: All three UI blocks tested successfully: BLOCK 383 (Daily Prompt card decorative circle removed, buzz-count dark brown #8B6914 font-weight 600), BLOCK 387 (Filter bar centered with justify-content:center, max-width:600px, flex-wrap:wrap), BLOCK 391 (Archive mini-cards clickable with cursor:pointer, hover effects, @username display, album art, navigation to post/prompt).
critical_code_review_comments: DailyPrompt.js line 86: No decorative circle div present (was 'absolute top-0 right-0 w-24 h-24 bg-amber-100/40 rounded-full' - now removed)
DailyPrompt.js line 90: buzz-count-top uses inline style color:#8B6914 and className font-semibold (weight 600)
DailyPrompt.js line 87-94: DAILY PROMPT label and buzz count on same row with flex justify-between
HivePage.js line 774: Filter bar uses justify-center, maxWidth:600px inline style, flex-wrap via gap-2.5 class
PromptArchiveDrawer.js line 35: MiniCard has cursor:pointer, hover:-translate-y-0.5, hover:border-amber-300/70, hover:shadow-sm
PromptArchiveDrawer.js line 75: Mini-card displays @username with @ prefix via data-testid='mini-card-username'
PromptArchiveDrawer.js line 84-100: Mini-card shows album art via data-testid='mini-card-artwork'
PromptArchiveDrawer.js line 24-29: onClick navigates to /hive?post={post_id} or /hive?prompt_id={id}
daily_prompts.py line 321: Archive endpoint includes post_id in featured response object
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK 383, 387, 391 all verified. (1) Daily Prompt card has no decorative circle, buzz-count uses #8B6914 dark brown with font-semibold. (2) Filter bar centered with max-width 600px, wraps on mobile (height 66px at 375px viewport). (3) Archive mini-cards have cursor:pointer, hover:-translate-y-0.5, hover:border-amber-300/70, hover:shadow-sm. Mini-cards display @username and album art. Click navigates to /hive?prompt_id={id} or /hive?post={post_id} and closes drawer.

block_383_no_decorative_circle.details: No 'absolute top-0 right-0 w-24 h-24 bg-amber-100/40 rounded-full' element found in Daily Prompt card

block_383_buzz_count_color.details: Buzz count uses inline style color:rgb(139,105,20) which is #8B6914 dark brown

block_383_buzz_count_weight.details: Buzz count has font-semibold class (computed fontWeight: 600)

block_383_buzz_count_alignment.details: DAILY PROMPT label and buzz count on same flex row with justify-between

block_387_filter_wrap_mobile.details: Filter bar wraps on 375px mobile (height 66px indicates 2 rows)

block_391_album_art.details: Mini-cards show album art via data-testid='mini-card-artwork'

block_391_click_navigation.details: Clicking mini-card closes drawer and navigates to /hive?prompt_id={id}

block_391_backend_post_id.details: /api/prompts/archive returns post_id in featured response object

regression_archive_drawer_opens.details: Archive link opens PromptArchiveDrawer with past prompts

mocked_api_note: Streaming links (Spotify/Apple Music) are MOCKED with search URL placeholders. Resend email is MOCKED.
